title: Regex compiled per call in parse_mentions, parse_hashtags, autolink_bare_urls
description: posting.rs lines 402, 425, 448 compile regex::Regex::new on every call to render_content. These are called on every post creation and profile bio update. The rest of the codebase uses LazyLock for regex patterns (see cards.rs, posting.rs:381). These three should follow the same pattern.
